game_info.title: Deep Shaft Down
game_info.concept:
Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him.  Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/downwell/id1032708262

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Downwell is a curious game about a young boy venturing down a well in search of untold treasures with only his Gunboots to protect him. Make your way further and further down into the darkness filled with nasty creatures and mysterious secrets to collect the spectacular red gems scattered about the rocks. Step into precariously placed shops and buy some helpful items or level up between levels to battle well-dwelling monsters and uncover hidden caves filled with riches and relics. No two trips down the well are ever the same!

Simple, Responsive Controls - Designed for mobile from the ground up, Downwell is presented with intuitive and elegant controls that allow for action-packed gameplay using just three buttons.

The Amazing Gunboots - The fashionable and lethal Gunboots allow players to unleash a torrent of firepower on the nasty creatures dwelling in the well and slow your decent with each shot. 

Unique Weapons & Items - Get different weapons, shop for peculiar items and obtain powerful upgrades that all stack and affect the way you play!

A New Adventure Every Time - Each level in Downwell is procedurally generated, so no two trips down the well are ever the same providing a fresh new adventure each time!

Music by Eirik Suhrke. 
Sound Design by Joonas Turner.
game_info.description: Deep Shaft Down is a high-octane 3D vertical scrolling action game inspired by Downwell. You play as an adventurer equipped with experimental Gunboots, plunging down a monster-infested procedural mine shaft. Your goal is to reach the bottom of the abyss alive. Use your Gunboots to blast enemies below you and slow your descent. Collect Red Gems to boost your score. Land on enemies to stomp them and recharge your ammo. The deeper you go, the more dangerous it gets.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys or WASD: Move the character horizontally (X and Z axes)
- Space: Jump (from ground)
- Z or Shift: Fire Gunboots (shoots downwards, slows descent)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)
- Esc: Pause / Resume

TEST_1.strategy_description: Start game in TEST_1 mode. Simulate holding the 'Right' key (D or ArrowRight) for 60 frames. Monitor the player's X position.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's X position should be significantly greater than the starting X position, indicating successful movement processing.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify Gunboot functionality and physics recoil.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Start game in TEST_2 mode. Position player in mid-air. Simulate pressing the 'Shoot' key (Z). Monitor player's vertical velocity (Y).
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Upon shooting, the player's downward velocity should decrease (or become positive), confirming the recoil mechanic works to slow descent.
TEST_2.description: Verify Gunboot functionality and physics recoil.
TEST_2.strategy: Start game in TEST_2 mode. Position player in mid-air. Simulate pressing the 'Shoot' key (Z). Monitor player's vertical velocity (Y).
TEST_2.expected: Upon shooting, the player's downward velocity should decrease (or become positive), confirming the recoil mechanic works to slow descent.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify enemy collision and damage system.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Spawn an enemy at the player's location. Monitor player health over a few frames.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player health should decrease from the initial maximum value, triggering a damage state or Game Over if health reaches zero.
TEST_3.description: Verify enemy collision and damage system.
TEST_3.strategy: Spawn an enemy at the player's location. Monitor player health over a few frames.
TEST_3.expected: Player health should decrease from the initial maximum value, triggering a damage state or Game Over if health reaches zero.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Position player above an enemy. Allow player to fall onto the enemy. Check enemy status and player ammo/velocity.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The enemy should be destroyed or take damage, and the player should bounce upwards, confirming the stomp mechanic.
TEST_4.strategy: Position player above an enemy. Allow player to fall onto the enemy. Check enemy status and player ammo/velocity.
TEST_4.expected: The enemy should be destroyed or take damage, and the player should bounce upwards, confirming the stomp mechanic.
